**UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES — Periodic Transaction Report**

Stamped: HAND DELIVERED. Legislative Resource Center — 18 OCT 10 AM 9:12. U.S. House of Representatives (For Official Use Only), initialed.

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** (202) 225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: ______ (File an original and 1 copy)
- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? [ ] Yes  [X] No
- Report type: [X] Initial Report  [ ] Amendment. Date of Report Being Amended: ______
- Notice: A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late.

Transaction grid header present (FULL ASSET NAME / TYPE OF TRANS-ACTION / DATE OF TRANS-ACTION / DATE NOTIFIED OF TRANS-ACTION / AMOUNT OF TRANSACTION columns A–K). Example row (ignored): JT — Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock — Sale — 02/05/015 — 03/07/15 — column B ($15,001-$50,000).

First data row of grid reads: "Please see the attached". Remaining grid rows blank.
